scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace=apps/web & npm run dev --workspace=apps/admin
scripts.build: npm run db:generate && npm run build --workspace=apps/web && npm run build --workspace=apps/admin
scripts.vercel-build:web: npm run db:generate && npm run db:push && npm run build --workspace=apps/web
scripts.vercel-build:admin: npm run db:generate && npm run db:push && npm run build --workspace=apps/admin
